root.sql: select distinct sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as c_receiptdate ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as receipt_tdate from sc_com_m_receipt Where 1=1 /*WHERE*/ --and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date between '23/06/2024' and '28/06/2024'

r_mwa_receipt_sum_daily_nest_shrfee.sql:
select sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id, sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as c_itemamount, count(sc_com_m_receipt_item.description) as c_countmember
,( case sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id when 'SB' then 'รับชำระค่าหุ้น' when 'FE' then 'รับชำระค่าธรรมเนียม' end ) as c_item_type_name
from sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = {0} and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 and ( (sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) or ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status is null ) ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id in ('SB','FE') ) GROUP BY sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id

r_mwa_receipt_sum_daily_nest_receive_loa.sql:
select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code, sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount) as c_prinamount, sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount) as c_intamount, count(sc_com_m_receipt_item.description) as c_countcontract
,( case sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code when '01' then '- ฉุกเฉิน' when '02' then '- สามัญ' when '03' then '- พิเศษ' end ) as loan_group_code_name
from sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_rule where ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.description = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = {0} ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) and ( (sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) or ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status is null ) ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type not in ('สอ') ) GROUP BY sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code

r_mwa_receipt_sum_daily_nest_payment_loa.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code, sum(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount) as c_loanamount, count(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no) as c_countcontract
,( case sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code when '01' then '- ฉุกเฉิน' when '02' then '- สามัญ' when '03' then '- พิเศษ' end ) as loan_group_code_name
FROM sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( ( (sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract) = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type not in ('สอ') ) ) GROUP BY sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code

r_mwa_receipt_sum_daily_nest_adding_loan.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code, sum(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount) as c_loanamount, count(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no) as c_countcontract
,( case sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code when '01' then '- ฉุกเฉิน' when '02' then '- สามัญ' when '03' then '- พิเศษ' end ) as loan_group_code_name
FROM sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail WHERE ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( (sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date) = {0}) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code = 'AD' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type not in ('สอ') ) ) GROUP BY sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code
